_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression
_publications._context: Describes the NI model (Nf1f/f;Cdkn2a;CGD). CGD encodes Cre recombinase, enhanced histone 2B-GFP, and diphtheria toxin receptor under the Nestin promoter. Used to study NF1 MPNST cancer stem cells alongside the NP model.

_publications._publicationTitle: Hydroxychloroquine prevents resistance to SHP2 inhibition in NF1-mutant cancers
_publications._context: Kinase enrichment proteomic analysis (MIB/MS) of NF1 MPNST tumors from the NI (Nf1flox/flox;Cdkn2a;CGD) GEMM treated with SHP099 and/or trametinib (PRIDE PXD035998). Also used for RNA-seq (GEO GSE283902).

basicInfo.description: Conditional knockout of Nf1 combined with loss of Cdkn2a (Ink4a/Arf), driven by the CGD transgene (Cre recombinase, enhanced histone 2B-GFP, and diphtheria toxin receptor under the Nestin promoter). Abbreviated 'NI' in the Parada lab. Equivalent to Nf1-/-;Ink4a/Arf-/-. Develops NF1-associated malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs).
